headline: Jefferies Bullish on The Coca-Cola Company (KO) Amid Strong Protein Business Outlook
summary: The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE:KO) is one of the best stocks to buy for financial stability. The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE:KO) continues to enjoy the confidence of 80% of analysts, who hold bullish ratings on the stock as of March 24, 2026. headline: How Coca-Cola (KO) Pricing Power And Protein Exposure Are Shaping The Investment Narrative
summary: Coca Cola's fair value estimate has been adjusted slightly, moving from US$83.36 to US$83.49, while several sell side firms are now flagging price targets in the US$87 to US$90 range. Those targets are being linked to views on Coca Cola's pricing power in beverages, its role in "easy protein" categories, and supportive commentary from recent conferences. As you read on, you will see how this evolving analyst narrative could shape the way you track Coca Cola from here. Stay updated as the Fair...

headline: Meet the Value Stock With a 6.6% Dividend Yield That's Begging to Be Bought in April
summary: Investors looking for opportunities in the beaten-down packaged food industry should take a closer look at General Mills.
